description_long: This is a modern military fighter jet with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The aircraft features a single vertical stabilizer at the tail and is equipped with multiple hardpoints under the wings and fuselage for carrying missiles and external fuel tanks. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a dark, streamlined canopy. The jet engine exhaust is visible at the rear, and the landing gear appears to be retracted, giving the plane a clean, combat-ready profile. The surface is finished in a matte gray camouflage, typical of tactical aircraft designed for low visibility.
description: A sleek, gray military fighter jet with swept-back wings, a single vertical stabilizer, and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical swept-back wings with visible underwing stores.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, underwing missiles, and the single vertical stabilizer at the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the jet engine exhaust, tail structure, and the full span of the swept-back wings.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the cockpit, wing-mounted stores, and tail assembly.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and multiple hardpoints; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with visible exhaust nozzle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear; gear is not deployed in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a streamlined canopy.
